positive: Minimalist abstract depiction of a forest scene. Silhouette style, extreme negative space contrast. Focus on interlocking geometric shapes representing stylized trees and roots, forming an elegant, repeating pattern. Color palette: deep indigo and vibrant emerald green against a stark off-white background. Composition: Centered, symmetrical, suitable for full-chest repeat print. High contrast, vector graphic quality, clean lines, clean edges, perfect symmetry, designed for screen printing on apparel.
